title: Energizing Slovkian Juicy Chinese Leaf Stir-fry
description: An energizing dish featuring Chinese leaf, infused with a savory and juicy flavor profile that is perfect for the whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Regular soy sauce is preferred for this recipe

ingredients.name: Fish Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a small amount to prevent overpowering the dish

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil.
Add minced garlic and scallions to the hot pan and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add Chinese leaf to the pan. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until just wilted but still slightly crisp.
Stir in soy sauce and fish sauce. Add red pepper flakes (if using).
Stir everything together evenly and cook for another 2-3 minutes until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
Add water chestnuts to the pan and stir-fry for an additional minute, allowing them to absorb some of the flavors from the sauce.
Serve hot as a side dish or on its own.
